title: Dos corazones y un cielo
writer: Raúl Zenteno, Rafael Baledón, Carlos Orellana
actors: Demetrio González, Eulalio González, Rosa de Castilla
plot: Husband and wife share the spotlight as two of Mexico's most famous ranchera singers, but when they decide to pursue solo careers, a Spanish theatrical empresario and an Italian female chocolatier will threaten their marriage.
